query:
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId
FROM services
WHERE externalId IN ('SG3D608','SSHKYHNC','SSCLR2F4','S1220','S1301','IPTEL-AB035443','S0467','S1315')
ORDER BY externalId;
